caption: The video features a man standing behind a microphone, addressing an audience. He is wearing glasses and traditional attire, including a white shirt with a distinctive red and black design on the chest and a black vest adorned with blue floral patterns. The background consists of wooden slats, suggesting an indoor setting, possibly a conference room or a hall. The man appears to be speaking earnestly, as indicated by his focused expression and the slight movement of his mouth. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, seems attentive, with some individuals having their heads turned towards him. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, hinting that the event may be related to this organization. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal presentation or speech.
